mapper.select: SELECT cs.id AS sessionId, cs.peer_id AS peerId, u.nick_name AS peerName, u.avatar_url AS peerAvatar, u.auth_status AS peerAuthStatus, cs.product_id AS productId, p.title AS productTitle, p.images AS productImage, p.price AS productPrice, p.status AS productStatus, cs.last_msg AS lastMsg, cs.last_msg_type AS lastMsgType, cs.last_time AS lastTime, cs.unread AS unread, cs.is_top AS isTop FROM chat_session cs LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = cs.peer_id LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = cs.product_id WHERE cs.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cs.is_top DESC, cs.last_time DESC
